name: Parameter Sweep (Initial Velocity Comparison)
description: Compare water hammer pressure rise for different initial flow velocities. Demonstrates Joukowsky relation: ΔP = ρ·a·ΔV. Tests 3 initial flow rates.

sweep.description: 3 flow rates to demonstrate proportional ΔP = ρ·a·ΔV

output.expected_peaks: ~1.63 MPa for 0.1 m³/s, ~2.26 MPa for 0.2 m³/s, ~2.89 MPa for 0.3 m³/s
output.description: Demonstrates linear relationship between initial flow velocity and the Joukowsky pressure rise.
